summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agile Ortho iteration 24 - Automated CRM + Marketing Sales System via WhatsApp. All 22 backend tests passed. Key features verified: WhatsApp webhook creates conversation with welcome message + AI reply, auto lead creation from first message, AI lead extraction after 2nd message (extracts name, hospital, district, product_interest, division_interest, buying_intent, urgency), lead scoring (hot=70+, warm=40-69, cold=<40), follow-up queue scheduling based on lead temperature, and all admin automation endpoints working.

minor.issue: Lead score labels have inconsistent casing (Hot vs hot, Warm vs warm, Cold vs cold) - cosmetic issue only

automation_stats: GET /api/admin/automation/stats returns followup statistics (total=8, pending=8, sent=0)
whatsapp_webhook_automation: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp creates conversation for new phone
Conversation includes AI reply (3 messages total)
Lead auto-created from first WhatsApp message with source=whatsapp, score=cold
ai_lead_extraction: After 2nd customer message, AI extracts: name, hospital_clinic, district, product_interest, division_interest, buying_intent, urgency
Lead score updated from cold to hot (score_value=100) based on extracted info
Example: Dr. Sharma, City Hospital, Warangal, titanium knee implants - 50 units, Orthopedics, high intent, urgent
lead_scoring: All lead scores are valid labels (hot/warm/cold)
Lead score breakdown available in automation stats
followup_scheduling: Followup queue items have valid score_label (hot/warm/cold)
POST /api/admin/automation/schedule-followups/{phone} schedules followups based on lead score
Hot leads get 4 followups: quick_followup (1h), specialist_connect (6h), catalog_share (24h), offer (72h)
existing_data_dr_kumar: Dr. Kumar conversation exists (919999900001) with 5 messages
Dr. Kumar lead: name=Dr. Kumar, hospital=Apollo Hospital Hyderabad, score=hot, score_value=95
Dr. Kumar has 4 pending followups scheduled

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp webhook correctly handles message_received events and triggers async AI processing
Welcome message sent immediately for new contacts (WELCOME_MSG constant)
AI lead extraction uses Claude Sonnet via emergentintegrations - extracts structured JSON from conversation

Lead scoring algorithm properly calculates score based on: name (+15), hospital (+20), email (+10), district (+5), product_interest (+15), buying_intent (high=+25, medium=+15), budget_mentioned (+10), urgency (urgent=+15, normal=+5), message_count (6+=+10, 3+=+5)
Follow-up sequences properly defined for hot/warm/cold leads with different delay_hours and message templates
Background scheduler (followup_scheduler) runs every 60s to process due followups
Interakt API calls will fail for test numbers (expected) but conversation/lead/followup data persists correctly in MongoDB
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via WhatsApp webhook during testing (TEST_Dr_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified all automated CRM + WhatsApp marketing features: 1) Webhook creates conversation + welcome msg + AI reply, 2) Auto lead creation from 1st message, 3) AI lead extraction after 2nd message extracts name/hospital/district/product_interest/division_interest/buying_intent/urgency, 4) Lead scoring works (hot=70+, warm=40-69, cold=<40), 5) Follow-up queue populated based on lead temperature, 6) All admin automation endpoints working (/stats, /followup-queue, /trigger-followups, /rescore-leads). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_automation_crm.py. Dr. Kumar (919999900001) is a hot lead with 4 pending followups. Interakt API calls fail for test numbers (expected - no real WhatsApp delivery).

verified_features.whatsapp_webhook: Creates conversation, sends welcome message, generates AI reply
verified_features.auto_lead_creation: Lead created from first WhatsApp message with source=whatsapp
verified_features.ai_lead_extraction: After 2nd message, extracts name, hospital, district, product_interest, division_interest, buying_intent, urgency
verified_features.lead_scoring: hot=70+, warm=40-69, cold=<40 based on extracted info and engagement
verified_features.followup_scheduling: Hot leads get 4 followups, warm gets 4, cold gets 2 - scheduled based on delay_hours
verified_features.admin_automation_stats: Returns followup stats (total/pending/sent/skipped/failed) and lead stats (total/whatsapp_sourced/by_score/by_stage)
verified_features.admin_followup_queue: Returns pending followups sorted by send_at
verified_features.admin_trigger_followups: Processes due followups and sends via Interakt API
verified_features.admin_rescore_leads: Re-analyzes all conversations and updates lead scores
verified_features.background_scheduler: Runs every 60s to process followup queue automatically

mocked_apis.interakt_whatsapp: Interakt API calls fail for test phone numbers (expected) - no real WhatsApp delivery. Conversation, lead, and followup data persists correctly in MongoDB.
